title: mentha palustris var. scrophulariifolia
intro: Mentha palustris var. scrophulariifolia, also known as Marsh Pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its square stem and small, blue-purple flowers. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful in treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Marsh Pennyroyal include reducing menstrual cramps, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from insect bites and stings. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as used in aromatherapy and topical applications to harness its therapeutic properties.
